question: The chart shows lost working days by year. Which statement is reliable according to the chart data?

options.B: 2014-15 has more lost working days than 2011-12.
options.C: 2011-12 has about twice as many lost working days as 2013-14, as suggested by the larger bar.
options.D: 2008-09 is the second-highest among the categories shown.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
